case_title: GEE, IRENE vs. HOWELL, LORA LEE et al

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GEE, IRENE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT HOWELL, LORA LEE THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 17 1/2 HEATHER AVENUE, SAN FRANCISCO, CALIFORNIA 941118

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GEE, IRENE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT HOWELL, LORA LEE THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: RESTORED TO PLAINTIFF ON SEPTEMBER 5, 2001 $5,640.00 RENT, $146.68 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,786.68
UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF GEE, IRENE AS TO DEFENDANT HOWELL, LORA LEE DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED
EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT HOWELL, LORA LEE
DECLARATION OF DAILY RENTAL VALUE $20.00 FILED BY PLAINTIFF GEE, IRENE
DECLARATION OF IRENE GEE FILED RE: AMENDED MONEY JUDGMENT
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT PURSUANT TO STIPULATION FILED BY PLAINTIFF GEE, IRENE
JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF GEE, IRENE SERVED AUG-13-2001, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT HOWELL, LORA LEE
